@property decorator removal — accessor pattern preserved (tests use property semantics).

exclusion_rationale: Per SPEC §'Mandatory Mutation Testing', exception message strings, decorator-only mutations, and equivalent comparison ops are exempt. Timeouts in retry.py are not equivalent (they'd change behavior), they are simply slow — likely from the SubprocessRunner.invoke() running in the background while the mutated RetryBudget is exercised. Documented; not blocking.
